title: Mighty Smoky Brazilian Ground Beef Skewers
description: Smoky and juicy Brazilian dish featuring ground beef, perfect for adventurous eaters and high protein diets.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine ground beef, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, black pepper, and cumin, mixing well with your hands until just combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Thread small portions of the beef mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the beef reaches an internal temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the skewers are cooking, place the wood chips in a smoker box or directly on the grill to infuse a smoky flavor.
Once the skewers are cooked, remove them from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
